'''dhawoho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:jobweek|jobweek]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-w-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jobweek|jobweek]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| dhawoho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhæweheth|dhæweheth]] || [[word:dhæwehej|dhæwehej]] || [[word:dhæwehesh|dhæwehesh]] || [[word:dhæwehe|dhæwehe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhawowohoth|dhawowohoth]] || [[word:dhawowohoj|dhawowohoj]] || [[word:dhawowohosh|dhawowohosh]] || [[word:dhawowoho|dhawowoho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhawohoth|dhawohoth]] || [[word:dhawohoj|dhawohoj]] || [[word:dhawohosh|dhawohosh]] || [[word:dhawoho|dhawoho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhawofhoth|dhawofhoth]] || [[word:dhawofhoj|dhawofhoj]] || [[word:dhawofhosh|dhawofhosh]] || [[word:dhawofhof|dhawofhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhawohotho|dhawohotho]] || [[word:dhawohojo|dhawohojo]] || [[word:dhawohosho|dhawohosho]] || [[word:dhawohoko|dhawohoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhawohoth|dhawohoth]] || [[word:dhawohoj|dhawohoj]] || [[word:dhawohosh|dhawohosh]] || [[word:dhawoho|dhawoho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhawohothol|dhawohothol]] || [[word:dhawohojol|dhawohojol]] || [[word:dhawohoshol|dhawohoshol]] || [[word:dhawohokol|dhawohokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhawohothotho|dhawohothotho]] || [[word:dhawohojojo|dhawohojojo]] || [[word:dhawohoshosho|dhawohoshosho]] || [[word:dhawohoko|dhawohoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhawohothon|dhawohothon]] || [[word:dhawohojon|dhawohojon]] || [[word:dhawohoshon|dhawohoshon]] || [[word:dhawohokon|dhawohokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhawohothoro|dhawohothoro]] || [[word:dhawohojoro|dhawohojoro]] || [[word:dhawohoshoro|dhawohoshoro]] || [[word:dhawohokoro|dhawohokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
